heading: Quarterly report on referrals for non-Department health care
label: 1703G Quarterly report on referrals for non-Department health care
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–210, title I, § 140(b)138 Stat. 2744Jan. 2, 2025“The first report under section 1703G [], as added by this section, shall be due not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this section [].”38 U.S.C. 1703GJan. 2, 2025
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–210, title I, § 140(b)138 Stat. 2744Jan. 2, 2025“The first report under section 1703G [], as added by this section, shall be due not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this section [].”38 U.S.C. 1703GJan. 2, 2025

children.label: A
children.text: the date on which a clinician employed by the Department determines that a veteran requires care, or a veteran presents to the Department requesting care, and the date on which the referral for care is sent to a non-Department health care provider;

children.label: B
children.text: the date on which such referral is sent to a non-Department health care provider and the date on which such non-Department health care provider accepts such referral;

children.label: C
children.text: the date on which such non-Department health care provider accepts such referral and the date on which such referral is completed;

children.label: D
children.text: the date on which such referral is completed and the date on which an appointment with a non-Department health care provider is made; and

children.label: E
children.text: the date on which such an appointment is made and the date on which such appointment occurs; and
any other period of time that the Secretary determines necessary.
